title: BEM-752 dispatcher fallback
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 18:43 (UTC+3)'
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return {}
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return {}
prev=load('governance/state/bem751_check_dispatcher_runtime_after_kick.json')
status=prev.get('status','unknown')
responses=prev.get('responses',[])
if status=='claude_response_found' or responses:
    final_status='response_ready'
    blocker=None
else:
    final_status='fallback_pending_created'
    blocker={'code':'CLAUDE_WORKFLOW_RUNTIME_NOT_AVAILABLE','message':'Dispatcher runtime is not proven. A pending fallback artifact is created so the next available Claude/GPT contour processes the latest mailbox item without operator relay.'}
    pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/claude_mailbox_runtime_fallback_required.md')
    pending.write_text('# Claude mailbox runtime fallback required'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Причина: dispatcher workflow runtime не доказан после BEM-750/BEM-751.'+sep+'Действие: обработать последний файл из `governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/` доступным Claude/GPT контуром, записать ответ в `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/`, не использовать оператора как relay.'+sep)
    handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
    handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | CLAUDE RUNTIME FALLBACK'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Dispatcher runtime not proven. Continue repair, but do not wait. Pending fallback artifact created: `governance/tasks/pending/claude_mailbox_runtime_fallback_required.md`.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'process_dispatcher_state_and_fallback.v1','bem':'BEM-752','status':final_status,'previous_status':status,'previous_state':'governance/state/bem751_check_dispatcher_runtime_after_kick.json','responses_found':len(responses),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem752_process_dispatcher_state_and_fallback.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem752_process_dispatcher_state_and_fallback.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-752 | Dispatcher State And Fallback | '+final_status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Previous status: '+status+sep+'Responses: '+str(len(responses))+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem752_process_dispatcher_state_and_fallback','status':final_status,'previous_status':status,'responses_found':len(responses),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem752_process_dispatcher_state_and_fallback.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-752 '+final_status+' previous='+status+'\n')
changed=[str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)]
if final_status=='fallback_pending_created':
    changed.extend(['governance/tasks/pending/claude_mailbox_runtime_fallback_required.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md'])
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Processed dispatcher runtime state and created no-operator fallback artifact if Claude workflow runtime is not proven')
"""
No issue comments.
